calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-17-2009 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Feb-19-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

John C. Josefberg, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Marriott Hotel Services, Inc., a Delaware corporation, d/b/a San Francisco Marriott.
Ken Hansen, plaintiff's Director of Finance, was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendant Anfitriones Nacionales, SA de CV, a foreign corportion.
Default was entered against defendant on December 8, 2008.
Doe defendants were dismissed on February 4, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Marriott Hotel Services, Inc., a Delaware corporation, d/b/a San Francisco Marriott, and against the Defaulted Defendant Anfitriones Nacionales, SA de CV, a foreign corportion as follows:

Damages/Principal - $301,049.39.
Prejudgment Interest - $149,019.26.
Attorney's Fees - $75,262.25.
Costs - $335.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $525,665.90.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
